nodes.label: AI as marketing content generator
nodes.grounding_span: I asked an AI to review our company website and put together a plan of weekly LinkedIn posts and monthly blogs

nodes.label: AI conversational memory reliability
nodes.grounding_span: When I went back to the conversation I found it had forgotten what we were talking about

nodes.label: AI output authenticity and brand voice
nodes.grounding_span: I want to make sure that the tone of voice sounds like our company

nodes.label: AI as conversational thinking partner for complex tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I found it very helpful to have the conversational aspect with the AI to check things and ask questions

nodes.label: AI data privacy and platform control
nodes.label_negative: Unrestricted AI use with real data
nodes.grounding_span: I am very cautious about using any of our real company data

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: It helps save time and money

nodes.label: Authentic brand representation
nodes.grounding_span: I want to make sure that the tone of voice sounds like our company

nodes.label: Accuracy and correctness in calculations
nodes.grounding_span: I was able to see that what I had calculated was correct

nodes.label: Data security and privacy
nodes.grounding_span: I am very cautious about using any of our real company data

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as thinking partner for HR calculations
nodes.grounding_span: I found it very helpful to have the conversational aspect with the AI to check things and ask questions

nodes.label: Frustration with AI forgetting context
nodes.grounding_span: When I went back to the conversation I found it had forgotten what we were talking about

nodes.label: Cautious optimism about increased AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I think we will use it more and more as people get more confident

nodes.label: Need for human review of AI-generated content
nodes.grounding_span: I feel I will have to review them and edit/tweak them anyway

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through conversational prompting
nodes.grounding_span: It was an ongoing conversation as I was refining what I needed to ask

nodes.label: Cautious boundary-setting around data and platform use
nodes.grounding_span: We are very mindful though about not having the team use any platform they want
